videoSnippet.title: Wow! || Magnus vs Arjun || FIDE World Rapid Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2832) - Erigaisi Arjun (2741)
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 | Rapid (Chess.com) [06] 2026.06.18
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, classical variation (5.Bf4)

1.Nf3 d5 2.d4 Nf6 3.c4 e6 4.Nc3 Be7 5.Bf4 O-O 6.e3 c5 7.dxc5 Nc6 8.Be2 dxc4 9.Bxc4 Bxc5 10.O-O Nh5 11.Qe2 Nxf4 12.exf4 b6 13.Rad1 Qe7 14.Ne4 Bb7 15.Nxc5 Qxc5 16.Ng5 Nd4 17.Qd3 Nf5 18.Rfe1 Qc6 19.f3 b5 20.Bxe6 fxe6 21.Nxe6 Qb6+ 22.Kh1 Rf6 23.Ng5 h6 24.Qb3+ Kh8 25.Nf7+ Kh7 26.Ne5 Rd8 27.Nd7 Rxd7 28.Rxd7 Qf2 29.Qd1 Rg6 30.Re2 Qxf3
